title: Run a quick digital check for understanding
staff_situations: How do I run a quick digital check for understanding?
underlying_needs: A fast way to capture learner responses in the moment
A low-friction digital tool that doesn't disrupt the pace of a lesson
A record of understanding that can inform what happens next

accessibility: Forms and polls can be completed using assistive technology
Photo or voice evidence gives a learner an alternative to writing under time pressure
inclusive_practice: Every learner responds, not only the one called on to answer aloud
Anonymous or low-visibility formats mean no learner is identified by an incorrect answer
trauma_informed: Avoids putting an individual learner on the spot in front of peers to demonstrate understanding

framework_alignment: Digital Skills Framework: digital assessment for learning tools
